review_questions: Does the candidate bind the approved P3-SPEC-COMPILER review decision as direct upstream authority?
Does assurance stay an evidence and traceability gate rather than a semantic authoring stage?
Does read-only QA remain unable to mutate compiled artifacts or write unauthorized outputs?
Does every implementation duty require a focused trace row, code target, validator, test, command, allowed paths, forbidden paths, and invalidation policy?
Does every trace row require a matching test obligation with positive and negative cases?
Does reviewed generated_at metadata avoid wall-clock, machine-local, branch, user, or filesystem-derived nondeterminism?
Do skills remain subordinate to specs, validators, locks, review gates, and source authority?
Are traceability exceptions forced through human gate with explicit scope delta?
Does the candidate report lock readiness without creating P3_SPEC_LOCK or P3_BUILD_LOCK?
